data.title: 蔚蓝档案正式加入 AX2025 专题讨论会！
data.summary: 📢 Blue Archive Q&A Event – Leading Up to AX2025! We’re thrilled to announce a special Q&A event ahea
data.body:
📢 Blue Archive Q&A Event – Leading Up to AX2025!
We’re thrilled to announce a special Q&A event ahead of AX2025!
This is your chance to ask anything you’ve ever wanted to know about Blue Archive!

🎉✨ Blue Archive Is Officially Joining AX2025 Panel Session! ✨🎉

🟦 We’re excited to confirm that Blue Archive will be hosting an official panel at AX2025!
Don’t miss the chance to connect directly with the dev team and hear exclusive behind-the-scenes stories

🎙 Q&A Session Details
A selection of your submitted questions will be featured and answered live during the AX2025 Blue Archive Panel Session.

🗓 Panel Schedule: July 3, 2025 at  6PM (UTC)

💬 How to Participate
📌 Submit Your Questions: https://forms.gle/Pe7nEzBmF9fk5ZbPA

We’re collecting your questions until:
🗓 Monday, June 23, 2025 at  9AM (UTC)

🎁 Special Reward
As a thank-you, 300 Pyroxenes will be rewarded to a few participants whose questions are selected for the panel!
Don’t miss this special opportunity to have your questions answered live by the Blue Archive development team at AX2025!

#BlueArchiveAX2025 #AX2025 #Goodsmile
![image.png](https://kivo.wiki/files/2824/eIoIbLwhSFC1TjWgN5HTz8hZobUDmf2P.png)
